questionHtml:
Daniela wins a prize. She is offered two options for receiving her winnings over a period of three years.

Option A: Daniela receives $4200 at the end of each month.

Option B: Daniela receives $1500 at the end of the first month. Each month after this, the amount she receives increases by 4%.

Sorin received an inheritance of $160 000. Sorin invested his inheritance in an account that pays a nominal annual interest rate of 5% per annum, compounded monthly. The interest is added on the last day of each month.

Find the total value of Daniela’s winnings and Sorin’s investment on the last day of the sixth month.
markschemeHtml:
Note: The first time an answer is not given to two decimal places in parts (a)(ii), (c)(i) or (d), the final A1 in that part is not awarded.

Sorin’s total 1600001+5100×126 164041.89…                    (A1)

Daniela’s total =15001-1.0461-1.04=9949.46⋯                    (A1)

total value =$173991.36                    A1

[3 marks]

meta.title: Find the total value of Daniela’s winnings and Sorin’s investment on the last day of the sixth month.
